prompt: Edit image 1: Change the 'Amount' value '$24,000.00' to match the 'Total' amount of '$3.26' found in image 2, ensuring it blends naturally with the receipt format.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Locate the 'Amount' value '$24,000.00' in the lower-middle section, positioned to the right of the 'Amount:' label. Replace this value with '$3.26', using the 'Total' amount found in the itemized list of image 2 as a reference. Ensure the new '$3.26' text in image 1 precisely matches the font style, size, color, and right-alignment of the original '$24,000.00' to seamlessly integrate with the receipt's visual format.
objects: Green "Paid" section at the top of a screenshot interface

"From" section with "Westpac Choice" and account number
"To" section with account number and "AUSTRALIA NEW ZEALAND BANKING GROUP"
